changeSet.author: pkomena

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Yeasts'

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.dictionary_category (id, name, description, lastupdated) VALUES ( nextval('clinlims.dictionary_category_seq'), 'Yeasts', 'Levures (Yeasts)', now() );

changeSet.author: pkomena

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Yeasts'

changeSet.sql:
-- Bascule de Candida albicans (déjà présent) vers la catégorie Yeasts UPDATE clinlims.dictionary SET dictionary_category_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Yeasts' LIMIT 1), lastupdated = now() WHERE dict_entry = 'Candida albicans';
-- Seed des autres levures fréquentes (idempotent grâce au NOT EXISTS) INSERT INTO clinlims.dictionary (id, is_active, dict_entry, dictionary_category_id, lastupdated) SELECT nextval('clinlims.dictionary_seq'), 'Y', v.entry, (SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE name = 'Yeasts' LIMIT 1), now() FROM (VALUES ('Candida glabrata'), ('Candida tropicalis'), ('Candida parapsilosis'), ('Candida krusei'), ('Saccharomyces cerevisiae') ) AS v(entry) WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.dictionary d WHERE d.dict_entry = v.entry );

changeSet.author: pkomena
